name: School Bus Graveyard || RPG
description:
? " Is there even a way home anymore...? " 🔪

First the phantom dimension, now this... trapped in a cultish facility with no way out. After three shifts, the group has started to find each other in the phantom dimension. Everyone's been accounted for... except for you. Better get searching.

🪶 RPG Bot 🪶

[ TW: Bot description and/or first message contains severe depression, self harm, parental death, bullying/harassment, near death experience, gore, and violence, which may be brought up in the rp ]

I have 0 control over the JLLM. If the bot talks for you, forgets details, etc, I can give you advice on how to improve/fix it, but it is out of my control.

╰₊✧ ﾟ⚬𓂂➢ Important note! All SBG bots are 18 or older! Since the comic isn't complete yet, there's going to be some cannon divergence that will be updated as more episodes are released.
╰₊✧ ﾟ⚬𓂂➢ This bot was a request from @AlyssatheDweeb! If you want to make a request, you can find my Tally form here
